ASR Tactical 2000 Lumen 5-Stage Rechargeable Flashlight with Adjustable Beam

Equip yourself with the dependable power of this 2000 lumen rechargeable tactical flashlight, built for field use, emergency readiness and rugged outdoor conditions.

Key Features

  • 2000 LUMEN LED POWER: Delivers ultra bright light output with a high intensity 2000 lumen LED bulb for superior visibility in low light or outdoor conditions
  • 5 VERSATILE LIGHTING MODES: Switch between 100%, 50%, 25% brightness, Strobe, and SOS modes to meet tactical, emergency, or everyday needs with ease.
  • ADJUSTABLE FOCUS BEAM: Quickly change from a narrow spotlight to a wide floodlight by pushing or pulling the flashlight head—perfect for camping, hiking, and search missions
  • COMPACT AND EASY TO CARRY: At only 7.5 inches length, with an included wrist strap, this flashlight is perfect for outdoor adventures, emergency kits, tactical gear or bug out bags
  • HEAVY DUTY ALUMINUM CONSTRUCTION: Built with durable, lightweight aluminum alloy for long-lasting reliability, even in rugged conditions.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRT-EC0ZBVWN
  • UPC: 810131704513
  • Color: Black

Engineered for performance, it features five tactical lighting modes: 100%, 50%, 25% brightness, Strobe and SOS, so you can maintain visibility, signal for help, or adapt to any environment in seconds. The adjustable focus design transitions smoothly between a concentrated spotlight for long range targets and a wide floodlight for area illumination, ensuring mission ready versatility.

Constructed from heavy duty aluminum alloy, this tactical flashlight is designed to withstand tough conditions without compromising on portability. Its compact 7.5 inch size and integrated wrist strap make it easy to carry in your gear bag, glove box, or emergency kit.

Powered by a rechargeable 2500mAh battery with a five to six hour charge time via the included micro USB cable, this flashlight delivers reliable, long lasting illumination, perfect for tactical operations, survival kits, camping trips, or any scenario where dependable light is critical.
